creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 153795
build session LOG for sysutils/cdrtools-devel

Any attempt to build sysutils/cdrtools-devel on
a recent -CURRENT (11), result in:

(cc),  : exited on signal 6 (core dumped)

I've also mentioned this, in regards to sysutils/cdrtools.
Where the build of that version dumped core 4 times.
This version only resulted in dumping core once. I went
further, and attempted to build the most recent version
available upstream (3.01a27). But the results are the
same. Maybe cdrtools should be marked BROKEN on CURRENT?

I'm attaching a script(1) session LOG of the entire build
session, which also includes the revision of the box I'm
[attempting] building cdrtools on.

Options chosen for this build:
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=CDDA2MP3
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=CDDA2OGG
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=DOCS
OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=NLS
OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=RSCSI

Attempts to build with only the *default* options chosen,
produced the same results.

Thank you for all your time, and consideration.

--Chris
